headline: SWEP Expands Production Capacity to Serve Growing Global AI Data Center Demand
summary: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill., May 13, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- SWEP, part of Dover  and a world-leading supplier of brazed plate heat exchangers , today announced plans to continue expanding its global...
